attributes.description: Raw order events from PostgreSQL CDC
Customer master data from MySQL CDC
Orders enriched with customer info via ksqlDB join
Orders converted to Avro format via Flink
Real-time order status changes aggregated by Flink

attributes.sql:
CREATE STREAM enriched_orders AS
SELECT o.order_id, o.product, o.quantity, o.price,
       c.name AS customer_name, c.email, c.tier
FROM orders o
  JOIN customers c
    ON o.customer_id = c.id
EMIT CHANGES;

CREATE TABLE order_status AS
SELECT order_id,
       LATEST_BY_OFFSET(status) AS current_status,
       COUNT(*) AS update_count
FROM orders
GROUP BY order_id
EMIT CHANGES;

INSERT INTO orders_avro
SELECT order_id, customer_id, product,
       quantity, price, currency,
       status, created_at
FROM orders;

INSERT INTO order_status_updates
SELECT order_id, status, updated_at,
       COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY order_id) AS status_count
FROM orders
WHERE status IS NOT NULL;
